title: Oru Kural Ketkuthu Song Lyrics Vazhakku Enn 18/9
stanzas: <div>Oru Kural Ketkuthu Song Lyrics Vazhakku Enn 18/9

Oru kural kaetkudhu penne
uyir vidum munne
undhan kadhil kaettiduma
kaettidumaa

oru alai adikkudhu penne
karai thodum munne
undhan kaigal theendidumaa
theendidumaa

manakadhavu thirandhidumaa
modhi naanum paarkiren
pazhagidumaa vilagidumaa
kanavilum ninaivilum

Oru kural kaetkudhu penne
uyir vidum munne
undhan kadhil kaettiduma
kaettidumaa

oru alai adikkudhu penne
karai thodum munne
undhan kaigal theendidumaa
theendidumaa

Mudhal mural mazhai megam
endhan vaasal maele
manam indru eeramaagi
baaram aagudhe

idhazh varai varum varthai
undhan paarvaiyaale
idam vittu thadam maari
thooram pogudhe

thanimaiyil theeyinai
theendi theendi naanum
kaayathodu vaadum verathil

vizhigalil varamena
edhiril neeyum vandhaai
vazha thondruthe

unmugam paarkkayil
kannile thaai mugam
varuvadhu yaenadi
unnidam enna naan
vendugiren

Oru kural kaetkudhu penne
uyir vidum munne
undhan kadhil kaettiduma
kaettidumaa

Thodaamale thottu pesum
moochu kaatrin vaasam.
vidaamale ennai indru
kooru poduthe

padaamale pattu pogum
pattu pondra kaesam
ezhaamale ennai veelthi
vendru poguthe

uravugal pirivena
vazhndhu vandhapodhu
vaanavillai kaatti pogiraai

erimalaiyin naduvinil
paniyai pola vandhu
veesip pogiraai

unakkena thandhida
ennidam uyarvena
edhuvum illlaiye

uyiraiye tharugiren
kanmaniye..

Oru kural kaetkudhu penne
uyir vidum munne
undhan kadhil kaettiduma
kaettidumaa

oru alai adikkudhu penne
karai thodum munne
undhan kaigal theendidumaa
theendidumaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional connections.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Vazhakku Enn 18, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and struggles in a romantic relationship.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Karthik, known for his melodious voice in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Oru Kural Ketkuthu is composed by Prasanna R.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 4, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kural Ketkuthu, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for love, encapsulating the emotional turmoil of relationships. The soothing melody, paired with Karthik's heartfelt vocals, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This song serves as a pivotal moment in Vazhakku Enn 18, highlighting the complexities of love and connection. The lyrics beautifully articulate the struggles of communication and understanding in romance, making it relatable to many.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kural Ketkuthu from the Vazhakku Enn 18 soundtrack is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love. Karthik's soulful vocals combined with Prasanna R's enchanting composition create a vibe that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is a perfect blend of emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for any Tamil music lover.
stanzaMeanings: A voice is calling, will your heart listen to my story?
A wave is rising, will your hands reach out to me?
Will the heart open up? I am watching, will it break or will it shine in dreams and thoughts?
A voice is calling, will your heart listen to my story?
A wave is rising, will your hands reach out to me?
The first rain cloud is above my door, today my heart feels heavy with a burden.
Words will come until the beauty of your gaze changes the place and moves far away.
In loneliness, I search for the fire, I will sing with my pain in another place.
In your eyes, is there a blessing? You have come to make my life flourish.
When I see your face, I feel like a mother’s face is coming to me, why do I want anything from you?
A voice is calling, will your heart listen to my story?
The breeze speaks softly, today it is telling me to let go.
The song will go on, the melody will rise, today it is asking me to leave.
When relationships break, there is no sky to show you the way.
Like the mist in the middle of the mountain, it comes and blows away.
There is nothing I can give you, I have nothing to offer you.
I will give you my life, my dear..
A voice is calling, will your heart listen to my story?
A wave is rising, will your hands reach out to me?
